name: Affiliate Onboarding — FirstPromoter Code Issue + Attio Write-Back

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, cust_id: $json.cust_id, profile: { first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name } }) }}

nodes.name: Create FirstPromoter Promoter
nodes.notes: POST https://api.firstpromoter.com/api/v2/company/promoters (API v2). Auth via bound httpHeaderAuth credential setting header `Authorization: Bearer <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>`. v2 also requires header `ACCOUNT-ID: qj5zoyxs` — hardcoded above (same value as the public tracking ID, not a secret). v2 body nests first_name/last_name under `profile`. Response body contains the promoter's promotion data; the next node reads `promotions[0].ref_id` for write-back to Attio.

nodes.name: Write Code to Attio Deal
nodes.notes: PATCH the deal record to write firstpromoter_code (the join key between Attio and FirstPromoter per attio-config-spec-v2.md). Auth header `Authorization: Bearer <ATTIO_API_KEY>` via bound credential.

notes: Triggered by an Attio webhook (or a forwarder from the Next.js app) when a PT/Influencer/Gym deal reaches the 'approved/activated' stage. Creates a promoter via FirstPromoter API v2 (POST https://api.firstpromoter.com/api/v2/company/promoters), then writes the returned ref_id back to the Attio deal's `firstpromoter_code` field — the join key between the two systems per attio-config-spec-v2.md. Env-free by design: no $env.* references; FirstPromoter and Attio auth come from bound n8n credentials. Both credentials are httpHeaderAuth with header `Authorization` value `Bearer <KEY>`. FirstPromoter v2 also requires header `ACCOUNT-ID: qj5zoyxs` — hardcoded on the FirstPromoter node (not a secret, same value as the public tracking ID). Webhook accepts either { record: {...} } (Supabase shape) or flat body with email/first_name/last_name/attio_deal_id.
